name: Howling Blade (M8S) - Official Adaptive Timeline
description: Phase-aware migrated adaptive timeline for Howling Blade (M8S). The canonical mitigation route keeps its local action timing while gaining cactbot-aligned phase anchors for the intermission and phase-two sections.

bossMetadata.name: Howling Blade (M8S)
bossMetadata.description: The final boss of AAC Cruiserweight Tier (Savage), wielding a sword and commanding wind and stone.

guideSources.title: AAC Cruiserweight M4 (Savage) Raid Guide for FFXIV

analysisSources.title: cactbot M8S timeline
analysisSources.notes: Section labels seed the planner-visible phase names and ordering.

analysisSources.title: FF Logs report API docs
analysisSources.notes: Planner phase overrides follow the same fight-phase timing model used for FF Logs report analysis.

analysisSources.title: MitPlan legacy savage migration
analysisSources.notes: Actions are preserved from the existing local mitigation route and annotated with cactbot-aligned phase anchors plus skip windows.

actions.name: Extraplanar Pursuit
actions.description: Heavy raidwide physical damage that marks the beginning of the fight.

actions.name: Windfang
actions.description: Hits all four players of one role with a conal AoE that deals split damage. Must be shared with one other player and inflicts vulnerability.

actions.name: Eminent Reign
actions.description: Spawns clones that charge in a direction, doing an AoE at the edge of the arena as well as in the centre. Followed by conal AoEs on both healers and tanks.

actions.name: Extraplanar Pursuit
actions.description: Heavy raidwide physical damage.

actions.name: Millenial Decay
actions.description: Heavy raidwide magic damage. Summons four wind wolf heads in succession that do line AoEs across the arena.

actions.name: Aero III
actions.description: Knockback from the centre of the arena, dealing light magic damage. Knockback immunity abilities can be used.

actions.name: Wind of Decay
actions.description: Wolf heads appear that tether to four players of one role at cardinals or intercardinals. These do a conal AoE towards them that deals proximity damage.

actions.name: Prowling Gale
actions.description: Towers that must be soaked by players, with the pillars in the tower determining how many players need to stand in them.

actions.name: Tracking Tremors
actions.description: A multi-hit stack marker on a healer. Hits eight times for heavy magic damage.

actions.name: Extraplanar Pursuit
actions.description: Heavy raidwide physical damage.

actions.name: Great Divide
actions.description: Shared tank buster on 1st in aggro. Can be invulned.

actions.name: Terrestrial Titans
actions.description: Summons two pillars that are slashed via Titanic Pursuit, causing them to fall. Creates two safe spots at opposite intercardinals.

actions.name: Revolutionary Reign
actions.description: Spawns clones that charge in a direction, doing an AoE at the edge of the arena as well as in the centre. Then does a large point-blank AoE which knocks back.

actions.name: Howling Havoc
actions.description: Heavy raidwide magic damage. A large persistent death AoE spawns in the middle of the arena.

actions.name: Pack Predation
actions.description: Each add does a conal tank buster on #1 on their respective aggro, as well as a conal AoE prey marker on one of the three other closest players.

actions.name: Ravenous Saber
actions.description: Five fast hits of a heavy physical raidwide after both adds die.

actions.name: Heavensearth
actions.description: Stack marker on one player of a role.

actions.name: Suspended Stone
actions.description: Marked AoE on four players in one role.

actions.name: Shadowchase
actions.description: Line AoEs from Howling Blade clones.

actions.name: Roaring Wind
actions.description: Line AoEs from wind wolf heads.

actions.name: Eminent Reign
actions.description: Spawns clones that charge in a direction, doing an AoE at the edge of the arena as well as in the centre.

actions.name: Weal of Stone
actions.description: Line AoEs from stone wolf heads.

actions.name: Great Divide
actions.description: Shared tank buster on 1st in aggro. Can be invulned.

actions.name: Beckon Moonlight
actions.description: Summons clones at cardinals, which cleave one half of the room the sword is facing with Moonbeam's Bite.

actions.name: Tracking Tremors
actions.description: A multi-hit stack marker on a healer. Hits eight times for heavy magic damage.

actions.name: Extraplanar Pursuit
actions.description: Heavy raidwide physical damage.

actions.name: Quake III
actions.description: Stack marker on both healers. Inflicts vulnerability and hits the entire platform the stack is on.

actions.name: Ultraviolent Ray
actions.description: Four players of one role and one player of the other role are marked. This shoots a line AoE that inflicts vulnerability and hits the entire platform.

actions.name: Gleaming Beam
actions.description: Two bits spawn on the back of each platform. One will charge up and fire, dealing damage to one half of the platform.

actions.name: Twinbite
actions.description: Magic tank buster on #1 and #2 on aggro. Hits the entire platform.

actions.name: Hero's Blow
actions.description: Howling Blade looks at one platform and prepares to swing his sword on the side it's glowing. This cleaves his left or right.

actions.name: Gleaming Barrage
actions.description: Donut or point-blank AoE from boss. Bits will be rotating around the boss, and the glow indicates if it hits in or out.

actions.name: Ultraviolent Ray
actions.description: Four players of one role and one player of the other role are marked. This shoots a line AoE that inflicts vulnerability and hits the entire platform.

actions.name: Gleaming Beam
actions.description: Two bits spawn on the back of each platform. One will charge up and fire, dealing damage to one half of the platform.

actions.name: Quake III
actions.description: Stack marker on both healers. Inflicts vulnerability and hits the entire platform the stack is on.

actions.name: Elemental Purge
actions.description: A 210 degree cleave on #1 in aggro after binding them, inflicting a vuln. Either #1 or #2 in aggro receive the Patience of Wind debuff, which is an AoE magical tank buster.

actions.name: Twofold Tempest
actions.description: Begins the first tether AoE. In addition, the closest player receives a shared line AoE that inflicts a short magic vuln.

actions.name: Champion's Circuit
actions.description: Each platform is hit by Gleaming Beam, as well as a wide line, donut, in-safe, or out-safe AoE. These AoEs will rotate in the direction indicated by the boss.

actions.name: Quake III
actions.description: Stack marker on both healers. Inflicts vulnerability and hits the entire platform the stack is on.

actions.name: Ultraviolent Ray
actions.description: Four players of one role and one player of the other role are marked. This shoots a line AoE that inflicts vulnerability and hits the entire platform.

actions.name: Twinbite
actions.description: Magic tank buster on #1 and #2 on aggro. Hits the entire platform.

actions.name: Prowling Gale
actions.description: Towers that must be soaked by players, with the pillars in the tower determining how many players need to stand in them.

actions.name: Hero's Blow
actions.description: Howling Blade looks at one platform and prepares to swing his sword on the side it's glowing. This cleaves his left or right.

actions.name: Gleaming Barrage
actions.description: Donut or point-blank AoE from boss. Bits will be rotating around the boss, and the glow indicates if it hits in or out.

actions.name: Ultraviolent Ray
actions.description: Four players of one role and one player of the other role are marked. This shoots a line AoE that inflicts vulnerability and hits the entire platform.

actions.name: Howling Eight
actions.description: A multi-hit tower on a platform that hits eight times. Deals shared magic damage. This is followed by Mooncleaver.

actions.name: Starcleaver (Enrage)
actions.description: Enrage wipe mechanic that destroys the final platform.

branches.label: Default Route
branches.description: Phase-aware migrated route built from the existing MitPlan action library.
